languages.text: "Любому гостеприимству есть предел — я покину вашу свиту и продолжу свои изыскания. Я постиг многое на вашем судне, но мой голод познания не утолен, он тянет меня дальше. Благодарю, Вольный Торговец, пусть Омниссия осветит ваш путь".

"Everyone's hospitality has its limits — I will leave your retinue and continue my research. I have learned much on your ship, but my hunger for knowledge is not yet sated; it draws me onward. Thank you, Rogue Trader, may the Omnissiah light your path."
languages.original_text: "Любому гостеприимству есть предел — я покину вашу свиту и продолжу свои изыскания. Я постиг многое на вашем судне, но мой голод познания не утолен, он тянет меня дальше. Благодарю, Вольный Торговец, пусть Омниссия осветит ваш путь".

traits.locale_text: "Everyone's hospitality has its limits — I will leave your retinue and continue my research. I have learned much on your ship, but my hunger for knowledge is not yet sated; it draws me onward. Thank you, Rogue Trader, may the Omnissiah light your path."

"Everyone's hospitality has its limits — I will leave your retinue and continue my research. I have learned much on your ship, but my hunger for knowledge is not yet sated; it draws me onward. Thank you, Rogue Trader, may the Omnissiah light your path."

"Everyone's hospitality has its limits — I will leave your retinue and continue my research. I have learned much on your ship, but my hunger for knowledge is not yet sated; it draws me onward. Thank you, Rogue Trader, may the Omnissiah light your path."

languages.text: «Toda hospitalidad tiene sus límites, por lo que dejaré su séquito para proseguir mi investigación. He aprendido mucho en su nave, pero mi sed de conocimientos sigue impulsándome a continuar. Gracias por todo, Comerciante Independiente, y que el Omnissiah guíe sus pasos».
languages.original_text: "Everyone's hospitality has its limits — I will leave your retinue and continue my research. I have learned much on your ship, but my hunger for knowledge is not yet sated; it draws me onward. Thank you, Rogue Trader, may the Omnissiah light your path."

traits.locale_text: «Toda hospitalidad tiene sus límites, por lo que dejaré su séquito para proseguir mi investigación. He aprendido mucho en su nave, pero mi sed de conocimientos sigue impulsándome a continuar. Gracias por todo, Comerciante Independiente, y que el Omnissiah guíe sus pasos».

languages.text: 「誰のもてなしにも限りがあります――私はあなたの一行を離れ、研究を続けます。あなたの艦で多くを学びましたが、私の知識への渇きはいまだ癒えず、私を前へと駆り立てます。ありがとう、ローグトレーダー。オムニッシアがあなたの道を照らしたまわんことを」
languages.original_text: "Everyone's hospitality has its limits — I will leave your retinue and continue my research. I have learned much on your ship, but my hunger for knowledge is not yet sated; it draws me onward. Thank you, Rogue Trader, may the Omnissiah light your path."

traits.locale_text: 「誰のもてなしにも限りがあります――私はあなたの一行を離れ、研究を続けます。あなたの艦で多くを学びましたが、私の知識への渇きはいまだ癒えず、私を前へと駆り立てます。ありがとう、ローグトレーダー。オムニッシアがあなたの道を照らしたまわんことを」

languages.text: “每个人的热情都有其限度——我会离开您的随行队伍，继续自己的研究。在您的舰船上，我学到了很多，但对知识的渴求尚未餍足；它正在召唤我继续前行。感谢您，行商浪人，愿欧姆尼赛亚照亮您前行的路。”
languages.original_text: "Everyone's hospitality has its limits — I will leave your retinue and continue my research. I have learned much on your ship, but my hunger for knowledge is not yet sated; it draws me onward. Thank you, Rogue Trader, may the Omnissiah light your path."

traits.locale_text: “每个人的热情都有其限度——我会离开您的随行队伍，继续自己的研究。在您的舰船上，我学到了很多，但对知识的渴求尚未餍足；它正在召唤我继续前行。感谢您，行商浪人，愿欧姆尼赛亚照亮您前行的路。”

languages.text: "Jede Gastfreundschaft hat ihre Grenzen ... ich werde Euer Gefolge verlassen und meine Forschungen fortsetzen. Ich habe auf Eurem Schiff viel gelernt, aber mein Wissensdurst ist noch nicht gestillt und zieht mich weiter. Danke, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, möge der Omnissiah Euren Weg erhellen."
languages.original_text: "Everyone's hospitality has its limits — I will leave your retinue and continue my research. I have learned much on your ship, but my hunger for knowledge is not yet sated; it draws me onward. Thank you, Rogue Trader, may the Omnissiah light your path."

traits.locale_text: "Jede Gastfreundschaft hat ihre Grenzen ... ich werde Euer Gefolge verlassen und meine Forschungen fortsetzen. Ich habe auf Eurem Schiff viel gelernt, aber mein Wissensdurst ist noch nicht gestillt und zieht mich weiter. Danke, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, möge der Omnissiah Euren Weg erhellen."

languages.text: « Votre hospitalité a ses limites. Je quitterai votre entourage afin de poursuivre mes recherches. J'ai beaucoup appris à bord de votre vaisseau, mais ma soif de connaissances n'est pas satisfaite et me pousse à aller de l'avant. Merci, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Que l'Omnimessie guide vos pas. »
languages.original_text: "Everyone's hospitality has its limits — I will leave your retinue and continue my research. I have learned much on your ship, but my hunger for knowledge is not yet sated; it draws me onward. Thank you, Rogue Trader, may the Omnissiah light your path."

traits.locale_text: « Votre hospitalité a ses limites. Je quitterai votre entourage afin de poursuivre mes recherches. J'ai beaucoup appris à bord de votre vaisseau, mais ma soif de connaissances n'est pas satisfaite et me pousse à aller de l'avant. Merci, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Que l'Omnimessie guide vos pas. »

languages.text: "Herkesin misafirperverliğinin sınırları vardır. Maiyetinizden ayrılacak ve araştırmalarıma devam edeceğim. Geminizde çok şey öğrendim ama bilgiye olan açlığım henüz doymadı, hatta beni ileriye çekiyor. Teşekkürler Hür Tacir, Hermesih yolunuzu aydınlatsın."
languages.original_text: "Everyone's hospitality has its limits — I will leave your retinue and continue my research. I have learned much on your ship, but my hunger for knowledge is not yet sated; it draws me onward. Thank you, Rogue Trader, may the Omnissiah light your path."

traits.locale_text: "Herkesin misafirperverliğinin sınırları vardır. Maiyetinizden ayrılacak ve araştırmalarıma devam edeceğim. Geminizde çok şey öğrendim ama bilgiye olan açlığım henüz doymadı, hatta beni ileriye çekiyor. Teşekkürler Hür Tacir, Hermesih yolunuzu aydınlatsın."
